summary: Frontend-only Phase 1 regression testing completed across Home, Offline Center, Hifz, Stats, Recitation, and smoke routes. Requested new cards/features rendered and interacted successfully; one non-blocking integration issue observed in recitation history network calls.

integration_issues.flow: Recitation history fetch/save used by Stats heatmap and Recitation progress/history
integration_issues.issue: Supabase requests target placeholder endpoint when env vars are missing, causing aborted network calls and empty remote history data.

action_items: Guard recitation history calls when Supabase env is not configured (do not hit placeholder endpoint).
Optionally add graceful local fallback/empty-state messaging tied to configuration status for recitation history and heatmap.
Continue modularizing large page components to reduce regression risk.
critical_code_review_comments: QuranPage.tsx, HifzPage.tsx, and RecitationTestPage.tsx are large and tightly coupled, increasing regression probability for iterative feature work.
When VITE_SUPABASE_URL/ANON_KEY are absent, createClient still initializes with placeholder values, leading to avoidable failed external requests.
Not all interactive controls in tested pages expose data-testid (especially several Hifz controls), reducing deterministic automation coverage.
test_credentials: Missing: /app/memory/test_credentials.md not found (non-auth scope, not blocking this run).
seed_data_creation: LocalStorage updated during UI test: wise-home-dashboard-order/hidden and wise-recitation-auto-practice/silence-ms via feature interaction.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated at http://127.0.0.1:3000. Confirmed Home dashboard editor open/toggle/reorder/reset, Offline per-surah filter/search/action controls, Hifz smart planner card render, Stats recitation heatmap card render, and Recitation setup controls + transition to recording. Smoke routes /prayer, /azkar, /qibla, /settings loaded. One console/network issue persists for placeholder Supabase endpoint during recitation history calls.
rca of the issue: RCA: /src/lib/supabase.ts instantiates client with fallback placeholder URL/key when env vars are absent. Hooks like useRecitationHistory() always call supabase.from(...), so app attempts network requests to https://placeholder.supabase.co, producing aborted requests seen in console logs. Repro: open /stats or /hifz/test in env without VITE_SUPABASE_URL and observe failed recitation_history requests. Mitigation: gate history/save calls behind isSupabaseConfigured (or provide robust local adapter), and keep UI in explicit non-configured mode.
